title: smt2 support for partially initialized memory words is missing

features.name: memory array initialized with partially unknown bitvectors
features.description: Code should include a memory array (reg) initialized with bit vector literals containing 'x' (unknown) bits in initial block

features.name: partially unknown bit vector literal with x bits
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit vector literal with one or more 'x' (unknown) bits as a memory element initializer

features.name: memory read with indexed address
features.description: Code should include a memory read operation using an indexed address to access initialized memory words
